adapter_policy_matrix.rule: capture immediately, record body hash, then pass to schema-specific parser
record source lead and docs; do not attempt hidden or missing credentials
record retry policy, backoff, and sample size before live probes
capture public docs; create admission-gated future task
record stale endpoint and alternate homepage/docs before declaring absence
catalog but do not claim availability or coverage
verify empty body as a capture warning, not a source match

boundary: Pass 0149 expands the source substrate map and scheduler queue. It does not prove complete archive coverage, endpoint availability for uncaptured leads, source correctness, full-text access, experimental truth, theorem progress, or natural-law discovery.

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: claim extraction to formal target queue
domain_workbenches.substrates: arXiv + HAL + Mathlib + OEIS + LMFDB + Isabelle AFP

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: mechanism claim card with source, assay, intervention, endpoint, and negative evidence
domain_workbenches.substrates: PubMed + Europe PMC + bioRxiv + ClinicalTrials + UniProt + Reactome

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: structure-function packet with provenance and verifier gates
domain_workbenches.substrates: AlphaFold DB + RCSB PDB + UniProt + ENA + PubChem

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: composition-structure-property packet with unit and method receipts
domain_workbenches.substrates: Materials Project + OPTIMADE + NOMAD + AFLOW + OQMD + COD

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: spatiotemporal data packet with grid/version/license receipts
domain_workbenches.substrates: NASA CMR + NOAA NCEI + GBIF + PANGAEA + Copernicus + WorldClim
OpenML + Hugging Face + Papers With Code + GitHub + arXiv

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: policy claim packet with time-series provenance and counterfactual boundary
domain_workbenches.substrates: World Bank + OECD + FRED + SEC EDGAR + Our World in Data

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: invention claim packet with prior-art, literature, and assignee joins
domain_workbenches.substrates: PatentsView + EPO OPS + WIPO + Lens + Crossref

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: institutional claim graph by school, lab, dataset, paper, and grant
domain_workbenches.substrates: ROR + OpenDOAR + DSpace + OAI-PMH + Crossref + DataCite

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: benchmark receipt with dataset, model, code, metric, and rerun policy
domain_workbenches.substrates: Hugging Face + OpenML + Papers With Code + MLCommons + GitHub
GitHub + GitLab + Software Heritage + PyPI + npm

domain_workbenches.first_experiment: route claims to field-specific verifier gates before any theorem, law, or intervention claim can advance

registry_scale_targets.strategy: OpenDOAR plus re3data plus OpenAIRE drive repository discovery before individual endpoint probes
Crossref, DataCite, OpenAlex, CORE, and Semantic Scholar provide identifier joins across papers, datasets, venues, authors, institutions, and funders
OAI-PMH, DSpace, EPrints, Dataverse, and InvenioRDM adapters turn college databases into replayable source routes
Biomedical, earth, materials, physics, AI, economics, patent, and formal-methods databases become claim-specific evidence lanes
